title: 43. WPS Dicts: Converter Tool
original_text: Hecho. Creé el programa PyQt6 en: [tools/wps_libreoffice_dict_converter.py]... Qué hace: Muestra a la izquierda los diccionarios fuente de LibreOffice. Muestra a la derecha los destinos WPS... Verifica antes de convertir... Sólo habilita `Convert` si no hay errores bloqueantes. Regenera `BUILD_SOURCE_MAP.txt` al convertir. Verifiqué dos cosas: python3 -m py_compile... y el analizador interno detecta: 71 mappings, 0 blocking errors, 5 warnings...
expected_subject: feat(tools): add PyQt6 dictionary converter GUI
expected_body_lines: - Implement side-by-side view for LibreOffice sources and WPS targets
- Validate .aff/.dic pairs, dict.conf, and special case mappings
- Handle legacy fallbacks for km_KH, ms_MY, qu_EC, sw_TZ
- Enable Convert only when no blocking errors are detected
- Verify compilation and internal logic (71 mappings, 0 errors)
expected_command:
git commit -m "feat(tools): add PyQt6 dictionary converter GUI" \
  -m "- Implement side-by-side view for LibreOffice sources and WPS targets" \
  -m "- Validate .aff/.dic pairs, dict.conf, and special case mappings" \
  -m "- Handle legacy fallbacks for km_KH, ms_MY, qu_EC, sw_TZ" \
  -m "- Enable Convert only when no blocking errors are detected" \
  -m "- Auto-regenerate BUILD_SOURCE_MAP.txt upon successful conversion" \
  -m "- Verify compilation and internal logic (71 mappings, 0 errors)"
